screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: Machine state, production, target, good, reject, OEE, shift and communication overview

screens.name: Production
screens.purpose: Production counters, target remaining, cycle time, run, idle and downtime

screens.name: OEE
screens.purpose: Availability, performance, quality and OEE values in percent

screens.name: Shift Setup
screens.purpose: Operator, shift, target quantity, part number and part name entry

screens.name: Loss Entry
screens.purpose: Loss-code entry and current alarm/loss status

screens.name: Connectivity
screens.purpose: Wi-Fi, Google Sheets, Telegram, queue and delivery counters

screens.name: Diagnostics
screens.purpose: Modbus requests/errors, RSSI, heartbeat, last request age and clock sync

screens.name: System
screens.purpose: AFMS version, HMI communication settings, date/time and service information
